parameters.jsCode: const input = $input.first().json; const product = input.product || 'Product'; const platform = input.platform || 'facebook'; const audience = input.audience || 'Egyptians 18-35'; const angle = input.angle || 'savings'; const variations = parseInt(input.variations) || 3; const angles = {savings:'Save money', urgency:'Limited time offer', social:'Everyone is using it', quality:'Best quality in Egypt', gift:'Free gift with every order'}; return [{json:{product, platform:platform.toLowerCase(), audience, angle:angles[angle]||angle, variations, timestamp:new Date().toISOString()}}];

parts.text: Create {{ $json.variations }} Egyptian Arabic ad variations. Product: {{ $json.product }}. Platform: {{ $json.platform }}. Audience: {{ $json.audience }}. Angle: {{ $json.angle }}. Return ONLY valid JSON with array: [{hook,primaryText,headline,cta,platform}]. Hooks must be attention-grabbing Egyptian Arabic. CTAs drive action.

messages.content: You create Egyptian Arabic Facebook/TikTok ad copy. Output valid JSON only with variations array.

Create {{ $json.variations }} Egyptian Arabic ad variations for {{ $json.product }} on {{ $json.platform }} targeting {{ $json.audience }}. Angle: {{ $json.angle }}. Return JSON: {variations:[{hook,primaryText,headline,cta,platform}]}

parameters.jsCode: const gemini = $input.all().find(n => n.json?.candidates)?.json; const groq = $input.all().find(n => n.json?.choices)?.json; const ctx = $('Process').first().json; let variations = []; let provider = 'mock'; let raw = ''; if (gemini?.candidates?.[0]?.content?.parts?.[0]?.text) { raw = gemini.candidates[0].content.parts[0].text; provider = 'gemini'; } else if (groq?.choices?.[0]?.message?.content) { raw = groq.choices[0].message.content; provider = 'groq'; } if (raw) { try { const jsonMatch = raw.match(/```json\s*([\s\S]*?)```/) || raw.match(/```\s*([\s\S]*?)```/) || [null, raw]; const cleanJson = jsonMatch[1].trim(); const parsed = JSON.parse(cleanJson); variations = parsed.variations || parsed; if (!Array.isArray(variations)) variations = [variations]; } catch (e) { provider = 'mock'; } } if (variations.length === 0) { const p = ctx.product; const mockVars = [{hook:`Special offer on ${p}!`, primaryText:`Get ${p} at the best price in Egypt! Free delivery to all governorates. Order now before it runs out.`, headline:`${p} - 30% OFF`, cta:'Order Now', platform:ctx.platform}, {hook:`Everything you need!`, primaryText:`${p} delivered to your door. Guaranteed quality and excellent price. COD available.`, headline:`Best ${p} in Egypt`, cta:'Buy Now', platform:ctx.platform}, {hook:`Offer ends today!`, primaryText:`Don't miss ${p} at an exclusive price. Limited quantity and high demand. Click order now!`, headline:`Last Day - ${p}`, cta:'Reserve Now', platform:ctx.platform}]; variations = mockVars.slice(0, ctx.variations); } return [{json:{success:true, product:ctx.product, platform:ctx.platform, audience:ctx.audience, variations, provider, generatedAt:new Date().toISOString()}}];
